# Compression

> File compression (DEFLATE, ZSTD, Brotli, Gzip)

**Category:** Data · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** data · godot

## What this does

File compression (DEFLATE, ZSTD, Brotli, Gzip)

Specifies 4 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## What must be true

- **implementation:** Feature implemented in C++ engine core
- **platform_agnostic:** Works across desktop, web, mobile platforms

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **Deflate Compression** — when Standard deflate compression is requested, then Standard deflate compression completed.
- **Zstd Compression** — when Fast modern compression is requested, then Fast modern compression completed.
- **Brotli Compression** — when High-ratio compression is requested, then High-ratio compression completed.
- **Decompression** — when Decompress all supported formats is requested, then Decompress all supported formats completed.
